chunks:
# DigitalOcean App Platform Configuration
# IVD MCP Server — standalone MCP server for Intent-Verified Development
#
# Deploy: doctl apps create --spec .do/app.yaml --project-id <project_id>
# Update: doctl apps update <app_id> --spec .do/app.yaml

name: ivd-mcp
region: sfo

# CRITICAL: Disable DO edge cache — SSE streams require unbuffered responses.
# Without this, the Cloudflare edge cache buffers SSE events and clients receive 0 bytes.
disable_edge_cache: true

services:
- name: ivd-mcp
  source_dir: /
  github:
    repo: leocelis/ivd
    branch: main
    deploy_on_push: true

  environment_slug: python
  instance_count: 1
  instance_size_slug: apps-s-1vcpu-0.5gb  # $5/month, 512MB RAM

  # IVD MCP Server (SSE transport)
  run_command: "python wsgi.py --port 8080"
  http_port: 8080

  # Health check — lets DO know the server is alive and prevents premature restarts.
  # Without this, DO may kill the instance during idle periods or deploy transitions.
  health_check:
    http_path: /health
    initial_delay_seconds: 10
    period_seconds: 30
    timeout_seconds: 5
    success_threshold: 1
    failure_threshold: 3

  routes:
  - path: /

  envs:
  # ── Required env vars (canonical list: mcp_server/env_check.py) ──
  # deploy.sh gates on these — deploy is blocked if any are missing.
  # server.py validates at boot — server refuses to start if missing.

  # API keys for authenticated access (comma-separated)
  # Managed by: devops/keys.sh
  - key: IVD_API_KEYS
    value: "CHANGE_ME_IN_DO_DASHBOARD"
    type: SECRET

  # OpenAI API key for ivd_search embedding generation at runtime
  # Managed by: DO dashboard or doctl
  - key: OPENAI_API_KEY
    value: "CHANGE_ME_IN_DO_DASHBOARD"
    type: SECRET

  # Redis for MCP session storage (resumability across restarts)
  # Shares ada-redis cluster with "ivd:" key prefix for namespace isolation
  - key: REDIS_URL
    value: "rediss://default:REDACTED_REDIS_PASSWORD@ada-redis-do-user-367377-0.d.db.ondigitalocean.com:25061"
    type: SECRET

domains:
- domain: mcp.ivdframework.dev
  type: PRIMARY

alerts:
- rule: DEPLOYMENT_FAILED
- rule: DOMAIN_FAILED
